completed_steps.summary: Classified as multi-part with 3 parts: frontend (web/Next.js), backend (backend/Express+LangChain), admin (web/React+Vite inside backend/public/)
Found 2 README files (boilerplate only). No user focus area specified.
Tech stack analyzed: Next.js+Redux+Firebase (frontend), Express+MongoDB+Redis+LangChain+JWT (backend), React+Vite+TanStack (admin)
Quick scan: API routes from routes.ts (23 route groups), data models from module names (21 collections), component structure from directory listing
Source tree documented for all 3 parts with annotations. Written to source-tree-analysis.md
Dev guides written for all 3 parts. PM2 deployment, env vars, seed scripts documented.
Integration architecture: 3 integration points. HTTP REST, JWT cookies, session cookies, static SPA serving. Live queue flow documented.
Architecture docs written: architecture-frontend.md, architecture-backend.md, architecture-admin.md
Supporting docs: project-overview.md, source-tree-analysis.md, development guides (3), api-contracts-backend.md, data-models-backend.md, integration-architecture.md
Master index.md generated with all links valid (no To-be-generated markers)

technology_stack.frontend: Next.js 15, React, Redux Toolkit, TanStack Query, shadcn/ui, Firebase, Axios, pnpm
technology_stack.backend: Express, MongoDB/Mongoose, Redis, LangChain+Gemini+OpenAI, JWT, bcrypt, PM2, Jest, pnpm
technology_stack.admin: React 18, Vite, TanStack Router, TanStack Query, Zustand, shadcn/ui, pnpm
